steps.title: Identify the key description
steps.content: The passage explicitly calls these entries “fictitious” and “hoaxes perpetrated as jokes.” The blank needs a word that names what these false entries ARE once recognized.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the blank
steps.content: ”Fabrications” names made-up things, matching what the passage describes. Analyses, enhancements, and revelations describe studies, improvements, and revealed truths—not false content. That matches choice B — B is correct.
